title: The summer dress theory

title: What led a teenager and her boyfriend to kill her grandparents: 'They wanted to stop us from living our love'
subhed: On March 31, François and Danielle, a beloved couple in their 70s, were found dead in their home in northern France. Their 16-year-old granddaughter and her 15-year-old boyfriend confessed to the double premeditated murder.

title: When Darwin comes to town: How the urban jungle disrupts animals' natural selection
subhed: Whether it's more aggressive chickadees, snails with lighter coloring or pigeons with anti-pollution plumage, urban wildlife is trying to adapt to city life. Is it behavioral flexibility or true genetic evolution? For the past 10 years, researchers have been investigating.

title: Universal basic income, the utopian idea resurging in Silicon Valley
subhed: As artificial intelligence threatens to wipe out jobs, the idea of a basic income paid to everyone without conditions is resurfacing. But do tech CEOs share the same motivations as the philosophers and economists who championed it?
